search_candidates.content: # Annual Reports. ##### Download. # Financial Reports. #### About Us. The Company was established on October 19, 2016 under the name PT Sumber Mineral Global Abadi Tbk. The Company’s business activties include, metal and ore trading, sand and nickel trading, cement, lime, sand, stone wholesale trade, solid liquid fuel and gas wholesale trading and products. #### Head Office. Jl. Gatot Subroto Kav. 23 Karet Semanggi, Setiabudi, Daerah Khusus Ibukota Jakarta 12930. #### Quick Links. About Us News Financial Report Share Price Contact Us.

evidence.shareholders: shareholders, and the stakeholders. All of these efforts embody the Company’s commitment to sustainable growth and its positive contribution to the energy industry and society as a whole. 2024 RESILIENT OPERATIONS FOR A SUSTAINABLE FUTURE KETANGGUHAN OPERASI UNTUK MASA DEPAN YANG BERKELANJUTAN Komitmen PT Sumber Global Energy Tbk (SGER) dalam menjalankan bisnis secara tangguh, adaptif, dan berkelanjutan. Di tengah dinamika industri yang penuh tantangan, PT Sumber Global Energy Tbk tetap berdiri kokoh sebagai penyedia energi andal bagi pasar domestik dan internasional. Melalui sistem penambangan terpadu yang sistematis dan efisien, PT Sumber Global Energy Tbk memastikan setiap lini operasionalnya mampu merespons perubahan dengan cepat. Stabilitas operasional ini menjadi fondasi kuat untuk mendukung pertumbuhan jangka panjang yang sejalan dengan prinsip keberlanjutan. Lebih dari sekadar memenuhi kebutuhan pasar, PT Sumber Global Energy Tbk senantiasa membangun masa depan energi yang bertanggung jawab. Dengan mengintegrasikan aspek lingkungan dan sosial ke dalam strategi bisnis, PT Sumber Global Energy Tbk tidak hanya menciptakan nilai bagi pemegang saham dan pemangku kepentingan, tetapi juga memberi kontribusi nyata bagi masyarakat. Melalui ketangguhan yang dibangun di atas nilai integritas, inovasi, dan keberlanjutan, PT Sumber Global Tbk terus melangkah maju, membawa energi untuk dunia seraya dengan visi berkelanjutan. Amid the challenges and dynamics of the energy industry, PT Sumber Global Energy Tbk stands firm as a reliable energy provider for both domestic and international markets. Through an integrated, systematic, and efficient mining system, PT Sumber Global Energy Tbk ensures that every aspect of its operations can swiftly adapt to change. This operational stability serves as a strong foundation to support long-term growth aligned with sustainability principles. Beyond simply meeting market demands, PT Sumber Global Energy Tbk is committed to building a responsible energy future. By integrating environmental and social considerations into its business strategy, the company not only creates value for shareholders and stakeholders but also delivers tangible contributions to society. Driven by resilience founded on integrity, innovation, and sustainability, PT Sumber Global Energy Tbk continues to move forward—delivering energy to the world in line with a sustainable vision.
